description: Server state management with caching and suspense

patterns.name: Suspense query hook
patterns.code:
export const useProducts = () =>
  useSuspenseQuery({ queryKey: productsQueryKey(), queryFn: () => getProducts({ data: {} }) })

patterns.name: Mutation with invalidation
Prefetch in route loader
patterns.code:
loader: ({ context: { queryClient } }) =>
  queryClient.ensureQueryData({ queryKey: productsQueryKey(), queryFn: () => getProducts({ data: {} }) })
